response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished full-stack engineer, but the profile does not match this C++ capital-markets role. Hands-on C++ is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI) and an academic thesis, far short of the required 5–10 years of C++ on Windows. The core stack is JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience (only MySQL/MongoDB/generic SQL), and no fixed-income or derivatives exposure. RIDE Capital offers tangential investment-domain familiarity, but that work was Node/TypeScript, not C++. The mandatory technical and domain requirements are largely unmet.
strengths: Strong, broad software engineering and testing/TDD discipline
Some capital-markets domain adjacency via RIDE Capital
Fluent communicator with extensive workshop/teaching record
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~6 months) versus required 5–10 years
No SQL Server/Oracle and no fixed-income or derivatives experience
